objective: Compile one complete AgentSwitchboard-compatible GNHF prompt for a bounded disposable proof sprint without executing it.

repository.name: desktop-gnhf-disposable-proof
repository.branchContext: Use an isolated GNHF worktree based on the clean disposable repository branch.

forbiddenScope: Remote pushes, merges, deployments, credentials, and provider authentication
expectedArtifacts: One validated compiled GNHF prompt result document
safetyConstraints: Do not push, merge, deploy, authenticate providers, or handle secrets
Treat process exit without validated prompt contracts as failure
